Est. London — 2024

ARTISANAL

CRUNCH.

An obsessively crafted flavor profile, battered in spiced buttermilk and fried to golden absolute perfection.

The Collection

Our Signature Styles

CRISPY. JUICY.

SMOKEY.

✦ CLASSIC FRIED✦ TANDOOR SMOKED✦ KOREAN GLAZED✦ MADE FRESH DAILY✦ SIGNATURE RECIPES✦ CLASSIC FRIED✦ TANDOOR SMOKED✦ KOREAN GLAZED✦ MADE FRESH DAILY✦ SIGNATURE RECIPES✦ CLASSIC FRIED✦ TANDOOR SMOKED✦ KOREAN GLAZED✦ MADE FRESH DAILY✦ SIGNATURE RECIPES

Classic Crispy

FRIED

Double-dredged in spiced buttermilk batter, fried to a perfect golden crunch.

#CRISPY#GOLDEN#CLASSIC

Spiced & Smoked

TANDOOR

Marinated overnight in saffron yoghurt and smoked over charcoal for 6 hours.

#SMOKY#CHARRED#DEEP

Sweet Heat Glaze

KOREAN

Double-fried with gochujang glaze, finishing in caramelised sesame crunch.

#GLAZED#SPICY#UMAMI

The Collection

FAVOURITES

01
Signature

TIKKA SLICES

Tender chicken breast, charred over fire, finished with mint chutney. Perfectly crisp outside, impossibly juicy inside.

02
Street Classic

CHICKEN 65

Our desi street-style Chicken 65, fried to perfection for full-spectrum crunch and deep Southern flavour in every piece.

03
Chef Special

CHICKEN KEBAB

Grilled over open flame for a smoky depth. Garnished with fresh mint and served with our signature dipping sauce.

CLASSIC

INTERIORS

The best place where you and your family can spend some quality time while eating the best Chicken dishes.

CHEF

MEET THE

MASTER.

Executive Chef, SHACK.

Clark Kent

"Every piece of chicken that leaves my kitchen carries 18 years of obsession, fire, and the flavors of Southern India — nothing less."

Trained across London's finest kitchens and rooted in Tirupathi's bold spice heritage, Clark invites you into a dining experience built on fire, craft, and an obsessive love for crispy perfection.

0+

Years of Craft

0+
